# wndrfl ASSETS_FOR_AI
**Version 2.0 — SVG code embedded. No uploads needed. No patterns included.**

Upload this file to any Claude session. Claude reads the SVG blocks below and drops them inline into HTML output.

## Color application

Never edit path data. Control color via CSS only:

```css
/* On light background */
.wndrfl-logo path, .wndrfl-lockup path,
.wndrfl-momentum path, .wndrfl-odyssey path,
.wndrfl-journey path, .wndrfl-shelter path,
.wndrfl-symbol path, .wndrfl-alt path,
.wndrfl-element path { fill: #000000; }

/* On dark background or photography */
.wndrfl-logo path, .wndrfl-lockup path,
.wndrfl-momentum path, .wndrfl-odyssey path,
.wndrfl-journey path, .wndrfl-shelter path,
.wndrfl-symbol path, .wndrfl-alt path,
.wndrfl-element path { fill: #ffffff; }
```

---
